title: Amtech A2400 Pickaxe Handle, Wooden Mattock Handle, 35" (900mm)
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: PICK AXE HANDLE DESIGN: Replacement handle designed for use with standard pick axe and mattock heads.
KILN-DRIED BEECH WOOD: Made from durable beech wood for strength, resilience and long-term outdoor use.
900mm LENGTH FOR LEVERAGE: Longer handle provides improved leverage and control when digging or breaking tough ground.
COMPATIBLE WITH STANDARD HEADS: Designed to fit most standard pick axe and mattock heads for versatile use.
SUITABLE FOR DIY & TRADE: Ideal for gardening, landscaping, ground work and general outdoor tasks.
description: Product Description Versatility ✓ Compatible with most standard pickaxe and mattock heads ✓ Perfect fit for Amtech A2200 Pick Axe and A2300 Mattock ✓ Ideal for digging, breaking compacted soil, and removing roots ✓ Suitable for gardening, landscaping, construction, and excavation tasks Comfort ✓ Natural beech wood grip for a sturdy, confident hold ✓ 900mm (35") length delivers improved leverage with less effort ✓ Balanced design to reduce strain during extended use ✓ Allows smoother, more controlled swings for consistent results Durability ✓ Kiln-dried beech wood for exceptional strength ✓ Built to withstand heavy-duty outdoor work ✓ Reliable performance for tough terrain and frequent use ✓ Engineered for long-lasting stability and dependability Convenience ✓ Universal compatibility for quick head replacement ✓ Simple, secure assembly with a snug, reliable fit ✓ Easy to use for both professionals and DIYers ✓ Low maintenance, long-lasting wooden construction
